hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const ti=i.tool_input||{};const p=ti.file_path||'';const added=[ti.new_string,ti.content,ti.text].filter(v=>typeof v==='string').join('\n');if(!/(TODO|FIXME)/.test(added)){console.log(d);return}console.error('[Hook] Warning: adding TODO/FIXME comment'+(p?' in '+p:'')+'.');console.error('[Hook] Please confirm it is intentional and linked to a tracked task.')}catch{}console.log(d)})"
